summary: First backend testing iteration for Banh Bao Admin API. 30/30 pytest cases passed against the EXTERNAL preview URL covering auth (login/wrong-password/me/register/refresh/logout), dashboard stats, products CRUD with RBAC, customers CRUD, suppliers RBAC, orders create/cancel with stock decrement/restore, reports (revenue daily/weekly/monthly, debt, inventory), users list (admin/staff), and AI chat with real Claude Sonnet 4.5 + history persistence. No ObjectId/_id leaks detected across responses.

minor.issue: Login lockout window is 15 minutes after only 5 attempts, and the `locked_until` is unconditionally reset on every failed attempt (including before threshold). The reset on every failure extends the lockout window every retry which is acceptable defensively, but may surprise legitimate users mistyping during recovery.
Returns ok even when caller has no cookies (no auth required). Not necessarily a bug but worth noting.

Each request replays full DB history through the LLM session (up to 20 user messages) before sending the new message. This will multiply latency and cost as history grows. Consider using LlmChat session persistence or trimming.

action_items: Optional: optimize /api/chat to avoid replaying full history on every request (latency/cost).
Optional: only set login lockout `locked_until` once count >= 5 instead of on every failed attempt.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~1130 lines in a single file. Consider splitting into routers/services per resource for maintainability (>700 line guideline).

Cookies use SameSite=None;Secure - correct for cross-origin preview, but CORS_ORIGINS='*' in .env disables `allow_credentials`, so cookies are still usable only via direct fetch with `credentials: include` on an explicit origin. Frontend currently relies on Bearer fallback OR same-origin via the preview proxy.
Brute-force counter is keyed by (ip:email) - acceptable, but the upsert always overwrites `locked_until` so any failed login resets the 15m clock; minor.
All datetime fields are timezone-aware UTC (datetime.now(timezone.utc)) - good.
All Mongo finds explicitly project out `_id` - good; verified no leaks in 30 endpoint responses.
test_credentials: Admin admin@banhbao.vn / admin123 and Staff staff@banhbao.vn / staff123 both work as seeded. /app/memory/test_credentials.md was NOT present - flagging for main agent to add if standard practice.
seed_data_creation: No additional seed needed; backend already seeds 6 products, 5 customers, 3 suppliers, and 7 days of randomized orders on startup. Tests created and cleaned up TEST_-prefixed products/customers/suppliers and one order (cancelled, stock restored).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is fully green. Tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py - run with `cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/backend_test.py -v`. Uses Bearer header extracted from login Set-Cookie. /api/auth/session (Google OAuth exchange) was intentionally not tested as it requires a real Emergent session_id. Chat endpoint successfully called Claude Sonnet 4.5 via emergentintegrations and persisted both user+assistant messages.
